DP.488.0000:
Dawn: Hey, [0103,0000]?
The professor told me something.\f
He thinks [0100,0001] may have
reappeared at the Spear Pillar...
DP.488.0001:
Dawn: Hi, [0103,0000]!\f
You’re friends with the elder of
Celestic Town, aren’t you?\f
She told me that she had something
she wanted to show you.
DP.488.0002:
Dawn: Hi, [0103,0000]!
May I see your Pokédex?\f
...\f
Oh, my gosh! You’ve seen every kind
of Pokémon in Sinnoh!\f
Have you shown your Pokédex to
Prof. Rowan yet?
DP.488.0003:
Dawn: Hey, [0103,0000], have you
ever chatted with my kid sister?
DP.488.0004:
Dawn: Oh, [0103,0000], are you
acquainted with Bebe?\f
She lives in Hearthome City.\f
Every Trainer should make it a point
to pay Bebe a visit.
DP.488.0005:
Dawn: Hey! [0103,0000], you’ve got
a Poké Radar?\f
Watch for tall grass to rustle wildly
when you use your Poké Radar.\f
That could be a sign that a rare
Pokémon is hiding in there.
DP.488.0006:
Dawn: Hi, [0103,0000]!
How’s your Poké Radar?\f
When you use it, do you sometimes
see more than one patch of tall\r
grass rustling?\f
The patch farther away gives you a
better chance of seeing the same\r
kind of Pokémon in a row.\f
That’s the feeling I get, anyways.
DP.488.0007:
Dawn: Sometimes a patch of grass
sparkles when a Poké Radar is used.\f
People say a different-colored
Pokémon is hiding there!\f
Could that be true?
DP.488.0008:
Dawn: So, [0103,0000].\f
I’m also helping the professor put
together the National Pokédex.\f
Catching Pokémon can be really
challenging, can’t it?\f
But, it’s also so much fun!
DP.488.0009:
Dawn: [0103,0000]!\f
[0103,0000], [0103,0000],
[0103,0000]!\f
Congratulations for completing
the National Pokédex!
DP.488.0010:
Dawn: Is today maybe...
Your birthday, [0103,0000]?
DP.488.0011:
Dawn: Giggle...
Congratulations, [0103,0000]!\r
And many more happy returns!
DP.488.0012:
Dawn: Oh, it isn’t?\f
I wonder what made me think that
today was your birthday?
DP.488.0013:
Dawn: [0103,0000]!
I heard from the professor!\f
Congratulations, Champ!
DP.488.0014:
Lucas: Hey, [0103,0000]!
The prof told me something cool.\f
He thinks [0100,0001] has
reappeared at the Spear Pillar!
DP.488.0015:
Lucas: Hi, [0103,0000]!\f
You know the elder of Celestic Town,
right?\f
She told me she wanted to show you
something.
DP.488.0016:
Lucas: Hey, [0103,0000]!
Let me take a look at your Pokédex.\f
...\f
Awesome! You’ve seen every kind
of Pokémon in Sinnoh!\f
Have you shown this Pokédex to
Prof. Rowan yet?
DP.488.0017:
Lucas: Hey, [0103,0000], have you
ever seen my kid sister?
DP.488.0018:
Lucas: Hey, [0103,0000], have you
met Bebe?\f
She lives out in Hearthome City.\f
If you’re a Trainer, you owe it to
yourself to visit her.
DP.488.0019:
Lucas: Hey! [0103,0000], you’ve got
yourself a Poké Radar, too?\f
Watch for tall grass to rustle wildly
when you use that Poké Radar.\f
That’s a sign that rare Pokémon
may be hiding there.
DP.488.0020:
Lucas: Hi, [0103,0000]!
How’s your Poké Radar working out?\f
When you use it, do you sometimes
see more than one patch of tall\r
grass rustling?\f
The patch farther away gives you a
better chance of seeing the same\r
kind of Pokémon right in a row.\f
I think that’s how it goes.
DP.488.0021:
Lucas: Sometimes a patch of grass
sparkles when a Poké Radar is used.\f
They say a different-colored
Pokémon is hiding there!\f
I wonder if that’s true?
DP.488.0022:
Lucas: So, [0103,0000].\f
I’m also helping the professor out
with the National Pokédex.\f
Catching Pokémon can be really
challenging, can’t it?\f
But I also have a ton of fun doing it!
DP.488.0023:
Lucas: [0103,0000]!\f
Wow! I don’t know what to say!
I mean, it’s so awesome and all...\f
Sincerely, congratulations for
completing the National Pokédex!
DP.488.0024:
Lucas: Hey, [0103,0000]?
Is it maybe your birthday today?
DP.488.0025:
Lucas: I thought so!
Congratulations, [0103,0000]!\r
You know, I’m glad we’re friends!
DP.488.0026:
Lucas: Huh?
It isn’t?\f
Now, what made me think it was
your birthday? Freaky weird.
DP.488.0027:
Lucas: [0103,0000]!
The professor told me the news!\f
Congratulations, Champ!
